title: tetragonanthus decumbens
intro: Tetragonanthus decumbens, also known as the 'small-leaved tetragonanthus' or 'small-leaved four-angled', is a plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tetragonanthus decumbens include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections such as malaria and typhoid. The plant is used in herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be prepared by boiling the leaves in water or mixing them with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
